name: Trackless Sea
summary: A vast tropical ocean of trade routes, pirate waters, monster-haunted depths, sudden storms and strange lights beneath the waves.
politics: Trackless Sea is shaped by local powers, trade needs and old conflicts.
Adventurers can shift local balances quickly if they earn trust or fear.
culture: People of Trackless Sea carry strong local customs and stories.
Rumour, reputation and practical help matter to most communities.
rumours: Something old has stirred somewhere in Trackless Sea.
A recent disappearance has locals worried.
A merchant is paying quietly for reliable blades.
dmSecrets: A hidden faction is exploiting unrest in Trackless Sea.
An old site nearby is connected to a larger campaign mystery.
